title: Context Management Stack
description: Different context problems are handled by different tactics.

steps.content: Keep working, but the session is getting long. Preserve the important decisions and trim the noise.
steps.annotation: This is a context-management request, not a single tool action.

steps.content: Tool result budget trims a large shell output to a short summary.
steps.annotation: The first layer prevents oversized results from dominating context.

steps.content: Rolling summary updated: parser fixed, tests still pending, naming conventions preserved.
steps.annotation: A second layer preserves continuity across many turns.

steps.content: {"focus":"keep the parser fix, pending tests, and naming decisions"}
steps.annotation: The model can still explicitly request a manual compact when needed.

steps.content: Compacted conversation around the requested focus areas.
steps.annotation: Manual compact is the escape hatch above the automatic layers.

steps.content: The important decisions are preserved, and the noisy context has been reduced.
steps.annotation: This chapter is about a stack of tactics, not one compression pass.
